name: kenshi-mod-manager
description: A Kenshi mod load order manager with category sorting, conflict detection, AI-assisted sorting, and mod packs

scripts.build: electron-builder --win dir && node -e "require('child_process').execSync(require('path').join('node_modules','rcedit','bin','rcedit-x64.exe')+' \"dist/win-unpacked/BEEP Kenshi Mod Manager.exe\" --set-icon icon.ico')"
